instruction:
Calculate $E = \left(\sin\left(\frac{ \pi }{ 8 }\right)\right)^4 + \left(\sin\left(\frac{ 3 \cdot \pi }{ 8 }\right)\right)^4 + \left(\sin\left(\frac{ 5 \cdot \pi }{ 8 }\right)\right)^4 + \left(\sin\left(\frac{ 7 \cdot \pi }{ 8 }\right)\right)^4$

Options:
A. 7/8
B. 3/2
C. 5/4
D. 7/4
E. 15/8
F. 5/2
G. 13/8
H. 9/4
I. 17/8
J. 11/4
